sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76966" key="palintrapeli/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰλιν-τρᾰπελία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n76966.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παλιντροπία</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:132" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.132</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
